rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop) + Cowork.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Setup forks correctly across Claude Code and Cowork; connector paths use Claude Code settings and Claude Desktop/Cowork connector UI.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify capabilities BEFORE asserting, not after.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer note records manual cohort-prep run; packaging note identifies build-workbook substitution and rendered URL shape.
Prework contains platform setup instructions and local artifact tasks, not external research/stat claims.

notes: Technical pass is scoped to source markdown plus documented workbook substitution. Rendered workbook replaces <CONTENT_URL> with a customer-scoped starter.tar.gz URL.
